# UC-17.1.63 · ISE Stealth-Mode Posture and Compliance Pre-Auth Validation

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Advanced &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Operations &middot; **Wave:** Run &middot; **Status:** Verified

*Some compliance checks happen invisibly while you log in. We watch how often these silent checks fail — too high a failure rate means real users are being silently held back.*

---

## Description

Tracks stealth-mode posture (where the user isn't prompted) and detects high failure rates that indicate misconfigured stealth policies impacting users without their knowledge.

## Value

Stealth posture is invisible to users. A failed stealth check might silently restrict access. Monitoring failure rate ensures the silent enforcement isn't excluding legitimate users.

## Implementation

Schedule every 30 min.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Misconfigure stealth posture to require an unreachable file. Many endpoints fail silently. UC-17.1.63 fires.

### Negative scenario

Fix policy. Fail rate drops.

## Detailed Implementation

Standard prereqs/data/search/validate/operate/troubleshoot pattern.

## SPL

```spl
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (15060, 15061, 15062)
| stats count by MessageCode, posture_policy
| eval action = case(MessageCode=="15061", "pass", MessageCode=="15062", "fail")
| eventstats sum(eval(if(action=="fail",count,0))) as fails sum(count) as total by posture_policy
| eval fail_rate = round((fails/total)*100, 1)
| where fail_rate > 20
```

## Visualization

Per-policy fail-rate trend.

## Known False Positives

- Initial rollout — high fail rate before agent push completes.

## References

- [Cisco ISE 3.4 — Stealth Mode Posture](https://www.cisco.com/c/en/us/td/docs/security/ise/3-4/admin_guide/b_ise_admin_3_4/m_compliance_segmentation.html)
